$entry..validate: newData.hasChildren(['name','score','theme','timestamp']) && newData.child('name').isString() && newData.child('name').val().length <= 20 && newData.child('score').isNumber() && newData.child('score').val() >= 0 && newData.child('score').val() <= 10000 && newData.child('theme').isString() && newData.child('timestamp').isNumber()
